title: RNA Extraction from Cultured Human Dorsal Root Ganglia
author: Joesph B Lesnak

steps.title: Cell cultures are prepared as described in dx
steps.instruction: Cell cultures are prepared as described in dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.kxygxyd64l8j/v1

steps.title: Prepare RLT Plus containing Beta mercaptoethanol...
steps.instruction: Prepare RLT Plus containing Beta mercaptoethanol in separate tube in fume hood

steps.title: Prepare 350 ul of RLT Plus...
steps.instruction: Prepare 350 ul of RLT Plus lysis buffer for each sample

steps.title: Add Beta mercaptoethanol 1:100 in RLT Plus Buffer
steps.instruction: Add Beta mercaptoethanol 1:100 in RLT Plus Buffer

steps.title: Example
steps.instruction: Example: Add 10 ul of Beta mercaptoethanol to 1ml of RLT Plus

steps.title: Vortex
steps.instruction: Vortex

steps.title: Prepare 70% ETOH by diluting 100%...
steps.instruction: Prepare 70% ETOH by diluting 100% ETOH in Ultrapure Distilled Water

steps.title: Prepare 80% ETOH by diluting 100%...
steps.instruction: Prepare 80% ETOH by diluting 100% ETOH in Ultrapure Distilled Water

steps.title: Aspirate media and wash cells 1x...
steps.instruction: Aspirate media and wash cells 1x with 500ul of 1X DPBS

steps.title: Performing one well at a time,...
steps.instruction: Performing one well at a time, aspirate out DPBS and add 350ul of RLT plus buffer with Beta mercaptoethanol to each well

steps.title: Be careful when pipetting as this...
steps.instruction: Be careful when pipetting as this is soapy and will form a lot of bubbles if not careful

steps.title: Scrape down cells using cell scraper...
steps.instruction: Scrape down cells using cell scraper and collect RLT plus buffer and place in 1.5ml tube

steps.title: Vortex all samples for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex all samples for 30 seconds

steps.title: Transfer the lysate to a gDNA...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate to a gDNA eliminator spin column place in a 2ml collection tube

steps.title: Centrifuge for 30 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 30 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard column and SAVE flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard column and SAVE flow-through

steps.title: Add 1 volume of 70% ETOH...
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of 70% ETOH (usually around 350ul) to the flow-through and mix well by pipetting

steps.title: Transfer the sample to an RNeasy...
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample to an RNeasy MinElute spin column placed in 2ml collection tube

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 350 ul of RW1 to RNeasy MinElute spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 ul of RW1 to RNeasy MinElute spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through

steps.title: DNAse clean up step
steps.instruction: DNAse clean up step

steps.title: Add 70ul of RDD buffer to...
steps.instruction: Add 70ul of RDD buffer to 10ul aliquots of reconstituted DNase

steps.title: Add 80ul of RDD buffer +...
steps.instruction: Add 80ul of RDD buffer + DNase directly to spin column

steps.title: Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 minutes at room temperature

steps.title: Add 350 ul of RW1 to RNeasy MinElute spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 ul of RW1 to RNeasy MinElute spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 ul of RPE RNeasy MinElute spin column
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul of RPE RNeasy MinElute spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 15 seconds at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through

steps.title: Add 500 ul of 80% ETOH...
steps.instruction: Add 500 ul of 80% ETOH to RNeasy MinElute spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 2 minutes at ≥8000g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 2 minutes at ≥8000g at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through and collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through and collection tube

steps.title: Place MinElute spin column in new 2ml collection tube
steps.instruction: Place MinElute spin column in new 2ml collection tube

steps.title: Open lid of spin column
steps.instruction: Open lid of spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at full...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 minutes at full speed (16,000g) at room temperature

steps.title: Discard flow-through and collection tube
steps.instruction: Discard flow-through and collection tube

steps.title: Place MinElute spin column in new 1
steps.instruction: Place MinElute spin column in new 1.5ml collection tube

steps.title: Place 14ul of DNA/RNA free water...
steps.instruction: Place 14ul of DNA/RNA free water directly to center of spin column

steps.title: Incubate for 1 minute at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 1 minute at room temperature

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 minute at full speed (16,000g)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 minute at full speed (16,000g)

steps.title: Keep collection tube, and discard column
steps.instruction: Keep collection tube, and discard column

steps.title: Freeze and store RNA by placing in -80°C freezer
steps.instruction: Freeze and store RNA by placing in -80°C freezer
